title: MCCI Items
description: A simple mod that adds items from the MCC Island server
body:
# MCCI Items
## Sparks
_Each spark has a 1-second cooldown._
- Spark of Levetation
- Spark of Invisibility
- Spark of Speed 
- Spark of Regen 

## Gamerules
- tntAutoExplosion - When true, detonates dynamite when it is placed
- deathSpectator - When true, if you die, it changes the game mode to spectator.
- infinityBlock - When true, if concrete is in your hand, it produces 64 pieces of concrete every second.

## Other
- Heavy Crossbow - Crossbow with increased damage, when you take it in your hand a slowing effect is applied
- Building Block - Now, a block that does nothing
- Cleansing Effect/Potions - An effect that removes all effects

## Localization
- English
- Russian

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bjCBasvSSmI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

P.s. This is my first mod, don't judge me harshly.
